page: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance designed for entry-level accelerated workloads. It features 4 shared Intel Broadwell vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz, 20.0 GB of system memory, and a 360 GB NVMe SSD. The instance is equipped with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU allocation of approximately 0.1667, providing 8 GB of dedicated VRAM.

Performance benchmarks reveal a strong capability in machine learning inference. The instance achieves top-tier results in LLM inference, delivering 9881.81 tokens per second for prompt processing on a small 135M model and 3161.22 tokens per second on a medium 7B model. However, general compute and system tasks show moderate performance. The Intel Broadwell CPU registers average scores in stress-ng single-core and multi-core tests, while database operations and static web serving throughput are relatively weak. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is rated poor, indicating limitations under heavy multi-threaded CPU-bound tasks.

This instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated computing by utilizing a fractional GPU slice rather than a full dedicated card. This resource density is highly suitable for small-to-medium LLM inference, lightweight AI model development, and testing. It is less suited for high-throughput database hosting or intensive multi-threaded CPU processing due to its shared CPU architecture and lower performance in those specific benchmarks.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance designed for entry-level accelerated workloads. It features 4 shared Intel Broadwell vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz, 20.0 GB of system memory, a 360 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU providing 8 GB of VRAM. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in LLM inference, processing 3161.22 tokens per second on a 7B model, while general CPU and database operations perform in the average to weak range. This instance is highly cost-efficient for developers needing GPU acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated card, making it a strong fit for small-to-medium LLM inference, AI model prototyping, and lightweight machine learning tasks.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance featuring 4 Intel vCPUs, 20 GB RAM, 360 GB NVMe storage, and an NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, optimized for entry-level AI workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram features 4 Intel vCPUs, 20 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A40 GPU with 8 GB VRAM for entry-level AI inference.
tagline: Entry-level fractional GPU acceleration with balanced memory and NVMe storage for cost-effective machine learning inference and prototyping.
bullet_points: Fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
4 shared Intel Broadwell vCPUs and 20.0 GB of system memory
Top-tier performance in small and medium LLM inference workloads
360 GB local NVMe SSD storage for fast data access
Cost-efficient resource profile for AI prototyping and development
